message:
fix(vdbe,core): implement MemDatabase undo system + fix take_transaction match

Add MemDbVersionToken and snapshot-based undo system to MemDatabase:
- undo_version() captures table state and returns version token
- begin_undo()/commit_undo() bracket transaction undo regions
- rollback_to(token) restores captured snapshot (keeps savepoint per SQLite semantics)

Fix take_transaction() match in connection.rs: returns Option not Result.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
